[vc_row full_width=”stretch_row” gap=”0″ enable_overlay=”yes” el_class=”homeBanner homeVidBanner” css=”.vc_custom_1767826176649{background-position: center !important;background-repeat: no-repeat !important;background-size: cover !important;}” overlay_bg=”rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)”][vc_column el_class=”homeBannerText”][vc_column_text]

AURA HAIR STUDIO
ENHANCING BEAUTY Through Expertise

[/vc_column_text][vc_widget_sidebar sidebar_id=”bookingwidget” el_class=”mainBannerBtn”][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row full_width=”stretch_row” el_class=”weddingSlider featuredWeddings newFeaturedWeddings”][vc_column][vc_column_text el_class=”featuredWeddingsIntro smallTitle”]

  • INNISFIL
  • HAIR
  • SALON

FEATURED IMAGES

[/vc_column_text][vc_raw_html][/vc_raw_html][vc_raw_html]JTNDbGluayUyMHJlbCUzRCUyMnN0eWxlc2hlZXQlMjIlMjBocmVmJTNEJTIyaHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZjZG5qcy5jbG91ZGZsYXJlLmNvbSUyRmFqYXglMkZsaWJzJTJGU3dpcGVyJTJGNC4yLjAlMkZjc3MlMkZzd2lwZXIuY3NzJTIyJTNF[/vc_raw_html][vc_raw_html][/vc_raw_html][vc_row_inner el_class=”sliderBtn”][vc_column_inner] SEE THE PORTFOLIO [/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”homeTestimonials”][vc_column][vc_column_text el_class=”homeTestimonialsTitle”]

CRAFTED HAIR SERVICES

[/vc_column_text]

[vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″ el_class=”testImg”][vc_single_image image=”62665″][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″ el_class=”testiContent”][vc_column_text el_class=”justifyText”]

WOMEN’S HAIR SERVICES

Haircuts

At Groove Unisex Salon, we specialize in crafting haircuts that complement your individual style and personality. Whether you’re looking for a sharp, modern bob, a playful pixie cut, or soft, layered locks, our expert stylists use precision cutting techniques to deliver stunning results. We understand that every woman has unique hair needs, which is why we take the time to consult with you, ensuring you leave our salon feeling confident and radiant.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner]

[vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″ el_class=”testImg”][vc_single_image image=”62891″][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″ el_class=”testiContent”][vc_column_text el_class=”justifyText”]

WOMEN’S HAIR SERVICES

Hair Treatments

Your hair deserves pampering, and our hair spa treatments are designed to nourish and rejuvenate even the most stressed-out locks. Choose from our wide range of treatments, including Olaplex Treatment, Moisture Treatment, Shine Treatment, Colour Care Treatment, and Filler Treatment. Each treatment is carefully crafted to repair and revive your hair, leaving it feeling softer, healthier, and full of shine. These treatments are perfect for anyone who wants to restore their hair’s vitality and protect it from future damage.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner]

[vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″ el_class=”testImg”][vc_single_image image=”62664″][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″ el_class=”testiContent”][vc_column_text el_class=”justifyText”]

WOMEN’S HAIR SERVICES

Hair Colouring

From bold and vibrant to soft and natural, our hair colouring services at Groove Unisex Salon are designed to bring out the best in your hair. Whether you’re interested in balayage, ombre, full colour, highlights, or lowlights, our colour specialists use the highest quality products to ensure long-lasting results. We carefully consider your skin tone, hair texture, and personal style to create a custom colour that enhances your overall look, leaving your hair shiny and healthy. We also offer eyebrow tinting to complete your transformation, ensuring a polished, cohesive appearance.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner]

[vc_row_inner content_placement=”middle”][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″ el_class=”testImg”][vc_single_image image=”62666″][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″ el_class=”testiContent”][vc_column_text el_class=”justifyText”]

WOMEN’S HAIR SERVICES

Blowouts

Nothing completes a look like a flawless blowout, and at Groove Unisex Salon, we offer a variety of blowout styles to suit any occasion. Whether you prefer a classic, voluminous blowout or sleek and straight, our stylists at hair salon Kharadi, Pune are skilled in creating the perfect finish. Our blowout services will leave your hair smooth, shiny, and full of life, ensuring you’re ready to take on your day with confidence.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner]

[/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”celebrationBox”][vc_column][vc_column_text]

meet the experts
BEHIND THE CHAIR

[/vc_column_text][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”63144″ el_class=”celebrationBoxImg”][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width=”1/2″][vc_single_image image=”63413″][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”meetTeam”][vc_column][vc_column_text el_class=”smallTitle”]AURA HAIR SALON

ABOUT US

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text]

Located at Sr.no 71/1, Varad Complex, Grant Rd, Opposite Waterfront Society (EON Free Zone), Kharadi, Pune 411014, Maharashtra, India, Maharashtra, India, Groove Unisex Salon continues the legacy of providing exceptional hair services at a familiar spot, but with a fresh approach. Backed by years of industry experience and ownership of other successful salons, our dedicated team of experts is committed to bringing innovative styles and personalized service to every client.

At Groove Unisex Salon, we believe in the power of transformation through hair. Whether you’re looking for a simple trim or a complete makeover, our talented stylists at our hair salon Kharadi, Pune are here to listen and craft the perfect look for you. We pride ourselves on delivering precision, creativity, and an unparalleled level of care to ensure every client leaves feeling confident and rejuvenated.

With our combination of passion, expertise, and a welcoming atmosphere, Groove Unisex Salon is the go-to destination for all your hair care needs in Kharadi, Pune. Come visit us and experience the difference!

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”whyUs”][vc_column width=”1/2″ el_class=”whyAllContent”][vc_column_text el_class=”quoteBox”]

HAIRSTYLING SERVICES

Elegant Updos for EVERY OCCASION

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text el_class=”whyContent justifyText”]

At Groove Unisex Salon Kharadi, Pune, we specialize in creating beautiful hair updos that elevate your look for any special occasion. Our talented stylists design elegant styles such as classic buns, romantic loose updos, braided upstyles, and sophisticated chignons tailored to your hair type and personal style. Whether you’re attending a wedding, prom, formal event, or celebrating a special moment, our team ensures your hair is styled to perfection and holds beautifully throughout the day. We focus on balance, texture, and detail to create an updo that complements your features and overall look.

[/vc_column_text] SEE FULL SERVICES [/vc_column][vc_column width=”1/2″ el_class=”whySlider”]

[vc_single_image image=”63589″]
[vc_single_image image=”63591″]
[vc_single_image image=”63592″]
[/vc_column][/vc_row]
